subject: Ecology
title: Pollen Biology
description: Learn Pollen Biology in one minute.

hook.text: A pollen grain is a tiny survival capsule carrying half a plant's genetic code.

buildup.text: Its outer wall—the exine—is one of the most chemically resistant substances in nature.

discovery.text: Pollen shapes are species-specific. Forensic scientists identify plants from pollen left at scenes.

twist.text: When pollen lands on a compatible stigma, it grows a tube down into the ovule in hours.

climax.text: Some pollen tubes grow over 30 centimeters to reach ovules deep inside large flowers.

punchline.text: A grain of pollen is a seed's opening act.

quiz.question: What happens when pollen lands on a compatible stigma?
options: It grows a tube down to the ovule
